'''Air Marshal''' was a senior [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] rank of the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]]. [[Cargeloch]],<ref name="CatCW" /> [[Von Asch]], [[Shea Hublin]], and [[Klick (clone trooper)/Legends|Klick]] held this position.

{{Imp-stub}}

*{{Tales|5|Lando's Commandos: On Eagles' Wings}} {{1st}}
